channel.title: The Mutapa Times
channel.description: Business and intelligence newspaper delivering curated Zimbabwean news from foreign press for the diaspora.

item.title: More buses deployed as thousands of Zimbabweans and Malawians await repatriation at Musina border
item.description: By Simon Majadibodu l IOL THE Department of Home Affairs says at least 50 buses are expected to arrive at the Musina Repatriation Centre to help clear a growing backlog as thousands of Zimbabwean and Malawian nationals wait to return home. The move comes as anti-migrant organisations continue to call for undocumented immigrants to leave [...] The post More buses deployed as thousands of Zimbabweans and Malawians await repatriation at Musina border appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Shocking Insider Revelation: Thoma Mapfumo’s Closest Allies Reveal What He will Do as Chivayo Offers Him US$1.5 Million @wicknellchivayo
item.description: A Million-Dollar Dilemma: Thomas Mapfumo’s Crossroads Harare – A staggering US$1.5 million offer from controversial businessman Wicknell Chivayo has ignited a fervent debate across Zimbabwe, placing legendary Chimurenga musician Thomas Mapfumo, affectionately known as Mukanya, at a pivotal moment in his illustrious career. The proposition, extended during Jah Prayzah’s 39th birthday celebrations, earmarks a substantial [...] The post Shocking Insider Revelation: Thoma Mapfumo’s Closest Allies Reveal What He will Do as Chivayo Offers Him US$1.5 Million first appeared on My Zimbabwe News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘What shocked me’: Makhadzi responds to Zimbabwe backlash
item.description: The South African South African award-winning musician Makhadzi has responded to accusations from some Zimbabwean social media users who claimed she hates Zimbabweans, saying she was left shocked by the allegations after years of supporting artists from the neighbouring country. This comes after the singer faced the cancellation of her scheduled performance in Zimbabwe amid growing anti-illegal [...] The post ‘What shocked me’: Makhadzi responds to Zimbabwe backlash appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: China Is Restructuring Degrees. Is Zimbabwe Preparing Graduates for the Future Economy?
item.description: Every year, thousands of Zimbabwean graduates leave university with the hope that their qualifications will open the door to opportunity. Yet many encounter a labour market in which employers complain about skills shortages while graduates struggle to secure meaningful employment. This apparent contradiction raises an important question: are universities producing the graduates the economy needs? [...] The post China Is Restructuring Degrees. Is Zimbabwe Preparing Graduates for the Future Economy? appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: ‘What shocked me is when Zim people said l hate them’: Makhadzi responds to backlash
item.description: By Dumani Moyo l The South African SOUTH African award-winning musician Makhadzi has responded to accusations from some Zimbabwean social media users, who claimed she hates Zimbabweans, saying she was left shocked by the allegations after years of supporting artists from the neighbouring country. This comes after the singer faced the cancellation of her scheduled [...] The post ‘What shocked me is when Zim people said l hate them’: Makhadzi responds to backlash appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com. (via The Zimbabwe News) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Dynamos hammer Agama as Highlanders held in PSL thriller-filled Matchday 21 @nehandaradio
item.description: Dynamos thrashed Agama 4-0 while Highlanders were held by Simba Bhora as goals flowed across the Castle Lager Premier Soccer League on Matchday 21. The post Dynamos hammer Agama as Highlanders held in PSL thriller-filled Matchday 21 appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: South African Hawks deny investigating Wicknell Chivayo as News24 issues apology @nehandaradio @wicknellchivayo
item.description: South Africa’s Hawks have confirmed there is no active investigation into Wicknell Chivayo, while News24 has apologised for incorrectly linking him to a money laundering probe. The post South African Hawks deny investigating Wicknell Chivayo as News24 issues apology appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Luke-ing the Beast in the Eye: The Cape Verde moment —- An inspirational story that teaches the life lesson never to write anyone off in this age of the underdog @nehandaradio
item.description: Cape Verde’s remarkable World Cup campaign is more than a football story—it is a powerful lesson that no individual, nation or dream should ever be written off. The post Luke-ing the Beast in the Eye: The Cape Verde moment —- An inspirational story that teaches the life lesson never to write anyone off in this age of the underdog appeared first on Nehanda Radio. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Nehanda Radio

item.title: Mutoko project to cut crude oil bill by US$300m
item.description: Debra Matabvu and Precious Manomano PRESIDENT Mnangagwa is set to commission the Finealt Bioeconomy Industrial Park in Mutoko this week, marking a major milestone in the Government’s drive to accelerate... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: ‘Prioritise returnees’ Government steps up reintegration support for returning Zimbabweans
item.description: Sikhumbuzo Moyo, GOVERNMENT has directed the Civil Registry Department to prioritise Zimbabweans returning from South Africa who require identity documents, as authorities step up efforts to facilitate their smooth... (via H-metro) #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: H-metro

item.title: Thomas Mapfumo’s Ex-Publicist Urges Him To Snatch Wicknell Chivayo’s Million-Dollar Offer @wicknellchivayo
item.description: ‘Take The Bag’: Ex-Publicist Urges Thomas Mapfumo To Accept Wicknell Chivayo Offer Thomas Mapfumo’s former publicist Blessing Vava has urged the Chimurenga music legend to accept businessman Wicknell Chivayo’s huge performance offer. Vava believes Mapfumo should take the deal if he is invited to perform at Jah Prayzah’s anticipated wedding or for the Chivayo family. [...] The post Thomas Mapfumo’s Ex-Publicist Urges Him To Snatch Wicknell Chivayo’s Million-Dollar Offer appeared first on iHarare News. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Iharare News

item.title: Mortgage drought chokes Zimbabwe’s property market
item.description: Zimbabwe’s property sector is being held back by a chronic shortage of long-term mortgage finance, with industry leaders warning that the country’s banking system is failing to provide the patient capital needed to unlock billions of dollars in investment. Chairperson of the Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT), Mike Juru, said the absence of 25-year mortgage [...] The post Mortgage drought chokes Zimbabwe’s property market appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Kylian Mbappé scores again and France reaches World Cup quarterfinals with 1-0 win over Paraguay
item.description: PHILADELPHIA — Kylian Mbappé laughed and smiled — and scored, of course — when Paraguay tried to bait him and his French teammates into fouls and provoke fights, as hot heads became a recurring theme during one of the steamiest World Cup games on record. After the final whistle, Mbappé kept on walking and left [...] The post Kylian Mbappé scores again and France reaches World Cup quarterfinals with 1-0 win over Paraguay appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Research Group Unveils Roadmap for Zimbabwe’s Transition to ZiG Single-Currency Economy
item.description: HARARE – Economic policy think tank Africa Economic Development Strategies (AEDS) has unveiled a comprehensive roadmap to transition Zimbabwe to a fully fledged single-currency economy centred on the Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG), proposing that the country could achieve this milestone as early as 2028 through a carefully managed, phased reform programme. The proposal was presented during [...] The post Research Group Unveils Roadmap for Zimbabwe’s Transition to ZiG Single-Currency Economy appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail

item.title: Widow ordered to pay US$35k after 25-year house sale declared void
item.description: BULAWAYO – The Bulawayo High Court has refused to compel the transfer of a Kwekwe house sold nearly 25 years ago after ruling the agreement was illegal, but ordered the seller to pay the buyer’s estate US$35,000 to prevent her from benefiting from her own unlawful conduct. Justice Mpokiseng Dube found that Rita Hwata had [...] The post Widow ordered to pay US$35k after 25-year house sale declared void appeared first on The Zimbabwe Mail. #Zimbabwe #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe Mail
